title: Visible Learning — Educational Interventions by Effect Size
description: Effect sizes (Cohen's d) for 4 educational interventions from Hattie's Visible Learning meta-analysis (2009). Feedback (d=0.73) shows the highest impact on student achievement.

L2_specific: meta-analysis of educational interventions and their effect on learning outcomes
méta-analyse des interventions pédagogiques sur la réussite scolaire
comparative effectiveness of teaching strategies measured by Cohen's d
L3_detailed: feedback has the highest effect size (d=0.73) among educational interventions in Hattie's meta-analysis
le feedback a l'effet le plus fort (d=0.73) parmi les interventions pédagogiques analysées par Hattie
homework shows the weakest effect size (d=0.29) compared to feedback, direct instruction, and peer tutoring
